_comment: Team configs for projects that need multiple workers. Projects not listed here get a single worker launched with the default tool. All fields are optional -- omit to use defaults.

my-project._comment_example: Override defaults for a specific project. The example below launches a 3-worker team with codex as orchestrator and opencode workers. Copy this block, rename the key to your project's name (must match a `name` field in projects.json), and tweak the values.
